sampleData.note: Dummy data for export preview and PDF/source comparison only. Do not treat these values as imported organization facts.

values.MotionText: the attached policy be approved and added to the society records

renderedSample.html:
Fund Purpose Policy

Organization: Sample Community Society

Policy number: DON-003

Effective date: 2026-01-01

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Purpose of Funds

Funds are received, maintained, and applied to the organization's charitable or nonprofit purposes as described in the governing documents and applicable fund agreements.

Eligible Uses

Fund principal and income may be used for approved programs, grants, qualified donee gifts, or other lawful activities that advance the stated purposes.

Allocation

Salary, benefit, fundraising, management, and operating allocations are documented using a reasonable board-approved allocation basis and provided to the auditor or reviewer when required.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around 2027-01-01 and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of Sample Community Society on 2026-01-01.

Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.

Chair
_________________________________________
Avery Chen
Treasurer
_________________________________________
Morgan Patel

Source: FundPurpose.pdf; SHA-256 6fa830336f3c6a3437acc52427aa9465a2280a518e69475c8818c8d3153f5375

comparison.method: Normalized keyword overlap between extracted source PDF text and the dummy-filled remade template. This flags drift only; it is not a legal-equivalence review.

remadeTemplate.summary: Charitable fund purposes, qualified donee grants, CRA-approved purposes, and allocation of salaries and operating costs.

sections.heading: Purpose of Funds
paragraphs: Funds are received, maintained, and applied to the organization's charitable or nonprofit purposes as described in the governing documents and applicable fund agreements.

sections.heading: Eligible Uses
paragraphs: Fund principal and income may be used for approved programs, grants, qualified donee gifts, or other lawful activities that advance the stated purposes.

sections.heading: Allocation
paragraphs: Salary, benefit, fundraising, management, and operating allocations are documented using a reasonable board-approved allocation basis and provided to the auditor or reviewer when required.

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Purpose of Funds

Funds are received, maintained, and applied to the organization's charitable or nonprofit purposes as described in the governing documents and applicable fund agreements.

Eligible Uses

Fund principal and income may be used for approved programs, grants, qualified donee gifts, or other lawful activities that advance the stated purposes.

Allocation

Salary, benefit, fundraising, management, and operating allocations are documented using a reasonable board-approved allocation basis and provided to the auditor or reviewer when required.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate} and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of {CorporationName} on {EffectiveDate}.
